ticket.title: Intent Broker Agent: classifier + credit gate + specialist delegation
ticket.description: Authenticated requests route through a Haiku-powered intent broker: classify intent against the service catalog, handle credit freeze/confirm/refund, and delegate to the right specialist agent. A router + credit gate, not a god agent.

candidate_memory.link_reason: the decisions that define the broker
the Strands agent stack the broker delegates through

code_agent.rationale: code_agent keeps the in-scope codebase/decision/project context; agent_run/workspace is out of scope, rejected entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'input-validator.ts / input-sanitiser.ts', 'PRD v5.2 locked decisions' are in scope but tangential here (optional).

qa_agent.rationale: qa_agent keeps the in-scope codebase/decision context; agent_run/project/workspace is out of scope, rejected entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'input-validator.ts / input-sanitiser.ts' is in scope but tangential here (optional).

design_agent.rationale: design_agent keeps the in-scope decision/project context; agent_run/codebase is out of scope, rejected entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'Agent security policy', 'Credit system terms' are in scope but tangential here (optional).

product_agent.rationale: product_agent keeps the in-scope decision/project context; agent_run/codebase is out of scope, rejected entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'Agent security policy' is in scope but tangential here (optional).

human_teammate.rationale: Robin (the baseline owner) sees the current team entries; another actor's local note stays on its owner's device.
